Modifications by this project:
- Adapted from Claude Code skill format to GitHub Copilot CLI skill format
- Added Azure-specific icon reference table extracted from draw.io source
  (jgraph/drawio, Sidebar-Azure2.js)
- Added Japanese documentation
- Added Azure architecture diagram examples and best practices

The Azure icon data (img/lib/azure2/) is part of draw.io (https://github.com/jgraph/drawio),
which is licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.

Azure service icons are based on Microsoft Azure Architecture Icons,
used under Microsoft's terms: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/icons/
